blocks.text: Cash paid for income taxes amounted to $77.6 million, $25.9 million and $48.4 million during fiscal 2019, 2018 and 2017,
respectively. Cash paid for interest on borrowings amounted to $347.9 million, $85.3 million and $82.5 million during fiscal 2019, 2018 and 2017, respectively.
